commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose --env-file .env up -d --no-deps --build line-relay'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && for i in $(seq 1 30); do status=$(docker inspect --format "{{if .State.Health}}{{.State.Health.Status}}{{else}}{{.State.Status}}{{end}}" election-line-relay-1); echo line-relay=$status; if [ "$status" = "healthy" ] || [ "$status" = "running" ]; then break; fi; sleep 2; done'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T line-relay python - <<"PY"
from pathlib import Path
from hermes.supervisor.intake_server import (
    parse_ballot_summary_overrides,
    parse_candidate_score_overrides,
    looks_like_candidate_score_correction_text,
)
source = Path("/opt/election/hermes/supervisor/services/intake_server.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
assert "looks_like_candidate_score_correction_text" in source
assert "BALLOT_LINE_FIELD_BY_NUMBER" not in source
assert parse_ballot_summary_overrides("vote no 30") == {"vote_no": 30}
assert parse_candidate_score_overrides("4=14")[0].candidate_number == 4
assert parse_candidate_score_overrides("vote no 30") == []
print("intake_server correction parsing OK")
PY'
